title: BetterMC: Modded Ages
description: Revamps MC with mods to create a new experience for your gameplay
body:
![BetterMC](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e2cca28053a5f0ffdc500e3ea0ec1c7afc06593f.png)



## **📖 What's this modpack?**

Ever wanted to give minecraft a brand new look?

This modpack may help!

## **📖 What does it add?**

This modpack adds a bunch of various things like disasters, decorations, more armors, revamped structures, utilities and many more things.

## **📖 Will the modpack be updated to newer versions of the game?**

We hope that we are able to update it to newer versions but we also depend a bit on the creator´s of the mods inside this modpack.

## **📖 Is the modpack light?**

For most devices yes but some devices may not be able do handle it properly.

# **FAQ**

> **Q: Does Aged support multiplayer?**
> 
> **A:** Yes and No, BetterMC is build for singleplayer but can be downloaded as server file via e.g. [ATLauncher](https://atlauncher.com/downloads) / [mrpack-install](https://github.com/nothub/mrpack-install#readme) / [docker](https://github.com/itzg/docker-minecraft-server).
> 
> If you want to play with a friend we recommend to use [e4mc](https://modrinth.com/mod/e4mc) to create a server for free.
